mentions.role_in_text: Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Quantistry, a Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform, and IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a global leader in building quantum computers, announced today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid classical-quantum solutions, focusing on R&D challenges in the chemical and material industry.

mentions.role_in_text: Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Quantistry, a Berlin-based start-up offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform, and IQM Quantum Computers (IQM), a global leader in building quantum computers, announced today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to explore hybrid classical-quantum solutions, focusing on R&D challenges in the chemical and material industry.

"The growing collaboration with IQM strengthens Quantistry's commitment to reshape chemical and material R&D, from quantum to AI," said Dr. Arturo Robertazzi, Chief Growth Officer and Co-Founder at Quantistry.

Quantistry stands at the forefront of the SaaS chemical space, offering the world's most intuitive cloud-native chemical simulation platform, tailored for the design and discovery of new sustainable materials.

The Future of Materials: Engineered

mentions.role_in_text: The company whose website is being described.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Our mission is to empower the world's innovators to solve the biggest challenges in science and industry.

mentions.role_in_text: AI for materials science and digital R&D
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Our mission is to empower the world's innovators to solve the biggest challenges in science and industry.

We believe the path to a healthier, more sustainable future is built on a new generation of materials. By moving R&D from slow, physical labs to a fast, cloud-based Materials Intelligence Platform, we empower innovators with AI for materials science and digital R&D; thus, freeing them from bottlenecks and helping them create at the speed of thought.

mentions.role_in_text: developer of physics-based AI for materials discovery
mentions.occurrence_sentence: The breakthrough came when we realized the power of combining quantum chemistry, classical physics, machine learning and AI, generating thousands of high-fidelity predictions and finding patterns that would normally take decades to uncover.

The breakthrough came when we realized the power of combining quantum chemistry, classical physics, machine learning and AI, generating thousands of high-fidelity predictions and finding patterns that would normally take decades to uncover.
